payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT s.Name AS stadium_name, COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count FROM stadium s LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name;'}

inputs.sql: SELECT s.Name AS stadium_name, COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count FROM stadium s LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name;

final.final_sql: SELECT s.Name AS stadium_name, COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count FROM stadium s LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name;
final.answer_text: The stadium with the most concerts is Somerset Park with 2 concerts. Five stadiums have zero concerts.
